title: Better Grass
description: Adds the grass top texture to the side like better grass in optifine without any mods
body:
[My Website](https://pandadev.net) **Works with every other resource pack, just put it on the very top** ***

This resource pack is a replacement for Optifine's better grass feature, where the grass top texture is added to the side. This pack is for people that don't want or don't know how to use Optifine's. But still want to have the better grass feature, then this is for you. It doesn't require any mods! *** Check out my other projects on [my profile](https://modrinth.com/user/PandaDEV)
